title: Proposed Advertising Regulation Amendments
summary: Secondary sources report proposed tighter advertising regulation and penalties, but no enacted Bahrain official instrument or influencer-specific licence rule was verified from an opened source.

theme_notes.online_content.online_advertising_influe: Reported proposed amendments tightening advertising rules.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (law?). Related instruments: Related to consumer protection and online advertising rules Issuing authority unverified in the source; assigned to the Government of Bahrain pending confirmation.
